title: Graduate Research Excellence
story: Recognized for contributions to plant breeding research. Replace this with your real award and the story behind it — what you worked on and why it mattered.

title: Hackathon Finalist
story: Built a data-driven prototype under a tight deadline. Edit data/awards.json to add the details and your reflection.

title: Travel / Conference Grant
story: Awarded support to present research at a national meeting. Update with the conference name and what you presented.

title: Your Award Title
story: Add as many awards as you like — just copy one of these blocks in data/awards.json and edit the fields.
